data.title: Nova Minerals confirms potential higher-grade starter pit within the 4.05 Moz Korbel Gold Deposit in Alaska.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, Nova Minerals Limited disclosed encouraging findings from shallow reverse circulation drilling at the Korbel Main Deposit in their Estelle Gold and Critical Minerals Project in Anchorage, Alaska. The Company's flagship project, situated in the productive Tintina Gold Belt, reported positive results from drilling conducted within a planned starter pit. Nova Minerals Limited is listed on the NASDAQ as NVA, ASX as NVA, and FRA as QM3.
TURKEY’S FOREIGN MINISTER WILL REPRESENT TURKISH PRESIDENT ERDOGAN AT TRUMP-LED BOARD OF PEACE, A TURKISH SOURCE SAYS

data.title: Drut Technologies rebrands to Corespan Systems, focusing on AI infrastructure. New identity announced on Jan. 21, 2026.
data.description: A company based in Nashua, New Hampshire, made a significant announcement on January 21, 2026. Drut Technologies, known for its high-performance compute infrastructure solutions, unveiled its new identity as Corespan Systems. This rebranding signifies a shift in focus towards expediting the implementation and expansion of cutting-edge AI and data technologies. This move demonstrates the company's intention to evolve and adapt to the rapidly changing tech landscape.

data.title: In 2025, in-app purchases reached $167 billion globally, outpacing game spending for the first time.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, Sensor Tower, a prominent data provider in the digital economy, unveiled its 2026 annual State of Mobile report. The report disclosed that global in-app purchases (IAP) surged to $167 billion in 2025, marking a 10% growth from the previous year.

data.title: CGI to host Annual General Meeting of Shareholders and release Fiscal 2026 first quarter results on Jan. 28th. Stock symbols: GIB.A (TSX) GIB (NYSE).
data.description: CGI (TSX: GIB.A) (NYSE: GIB) will be holding its Annual General Meeting of Shareholders on January 28, 2026. The company will also be announcing its Fiscal 2026 first quarter results during the meeting. Investors can follow the updates by visiting cgi.com/newsroom.

data.title: Truist Financial (NYSE: TFC) reveals Q4 2025 results, with an earnings call at 8 am ET today.
data.description: Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC), based in Charlotte, N.C., has released its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025. The earnings call for this quarter will be held today at 8 a.m. ET. Investors can join the call either through webcast at app.webinar.net/9aJQk1yk8gm, or via dial-in. This update was provided on January 21, 2026.

data.title: Bill Washington appointed as Non-Executive Director at Arizona Sonoran, with Alison Dwoskin promoted to VP IR.
data.description: CASA GRANDE, Arizona and TORONTO -- ASCU has recently appointed Bill Washington to its Board of Directors as a non-Executive Director. Alongside, Alison Dwoskin has been promoted to the role of Vice President of Investor Relations. These changes come as part of the company's strategic moves in the mining sector, with a focus on Arizona.

data.title: DealerBuilt releases Lightyear Enterprise Retail Cloud, transforming multi-store retailing with seamless cross-rooftop sales. Launch at NADA Show 2026.
data.description: In Houston, DealerBuilt, known for dealership solutions like DMS, CRM, desking tools, AI, and marketing analytics, is introducing the Lightyear Enterprise Retail Cloud Platform at the NADA Show from February 3 to 6, 2026. This innovative platform transforms auto group operations as it allows dealers to sell inventory across all rooftops in their group without the need for individual accounting transactions for each site. This advancement streamlines processes for dealers and enhances their ability to manage sales seamlessly.

data.title: Younger generations prefer crypto over banks, while Boomers hold majority of US wealth. Generational shift may see billions flow into crypto, per OKX survey.
data.description: A recent survey by OKX reveals that Baby Boomers, who hold over 50% of the total household wealth in the United States, may soon transfer a portion of this capital into the cryptocurrency markets. This potential generational shift in investment preferences could have significant implications for the crypto industry.

data.title: Davos Dialogue at World Economic Forum in Switzerland promotes multilateralism and global dialogue with urgency in 2026.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, in Beijing, the World Economic Forum Annual Meeting commenced in Davos, Switzerland. The theme for this year is "A Spirit of Dialogue," reflecting the critical global challenges and diverse perspectives prevalent in today’s world. The event aims to bring together leaders from various sectors to discuss and address pressing issues.

data.title: Younger generations view crypto as finance's future. Boomers, owning >50% of US wealth, may invest in crypto. Generational transfer upcoming.
data.description: As Baby Boomers currently hold over 50% of US household wealth, the upcoming generational shift may direct a portion of this capital towards cryptocurrency markets.
